---
output:
  html_document:
    css: styles.css
    
---

<font size="5">

<center>**This is a collection of graphs, charts, and maps I've made using R (mainly ggplot2) to show the data-viz capabilities. Click to see more details about each plot and dataset.**</center>

</font>

----

<style>
  .col3 {
    columns: 3 270px;         /* number of columns and width in pixels*/
    -webkit-columns: 3 270px; /* chrome, safari */
    -moz-columns: 3 300px;    /* firefox */
  }
</style>

<div class="col3">

<font size="4"><center>**[2020 Daily Temperatures in Kiel](https://vinhhle.github.io/data_viz/)**</center></font>

<img src="/Users/huvi/Desktop/vinhhle.github.io/pics/kiel_temperature.png" width="270px">

<br>


<center>**[GDP vs Life Expectancy](https://vinhhle.github.io/data_viz/)**</center>

<img src="/Users/huvi/Desktop/vinhhle.github.io/pics/unnamed.png" width="270px">

<br>

<center>**[A map of Harry Potter](https://vinhhle.github.io/data_viz/)**</center>

<img src="/Users/huvi/Desktop/vinhhle.github.io/pics/test.png" width="270px">

</div>

----

<style>
  .col3 {
    columns: 3 270px;         /* number of columns and width in pixels*/
    -webkit-columns: 3 270px; /* chrome, safari */
    -moz-columns: 3 270px;    /* firefox */
  }
</style>

<div class="col3">

<center>**[How common is your birthday](https://vinhhle.github.io/data_viz/)**</center>

<img src="/Users/huvi/Desktop/vinhhle.github.io/pics/unnamed-chunk-11-1.png" width="270px">

<br>

<center>**[GDP vs Life Expectancy](https://vinhhle.github.io/data_viz/)**</center>

<img src="/Users/huvi/Desktop/vinhhle.github.io/pics/unnamed-chunk-12-1.png" width="270px">

<br>

<center>**[A map of Harry Potter](https://vinhhle.github.io/data_viz/)**</center>

<img src="/Users/huvi/Desktop/vinhhle.github.io/pics/unnamed-chunk-13-1.png" width="260px">

</div>
